description_long: This object consists of four wooden hangers, each with a classic triangular frame and a metal hook at the top for hanging. Two of the hangers are plain, light-colored wood, while the other two feature colorful, patterned designs along their bodies, adding a decorative touch. The hangers are slim and lightweight, with gently curved arms and notches near the ends to help secure garments with straps. The metal hooks are smoothly rounded and appear sturdy, suitable for hanging on rods or hooks in closets or storage areas. The overall finish of the wood is matte, with a smooth surface that is comfortable to the touch. These hangers are typically used for organizing clothing in wardrobes, coat racks, or retail displays.
description: A set of four slim wooden hangers, two plain and two with colorful patterns, each with a metal hook and notched arms for securing garments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four hangers aligned, highlighting the colorful patterns on two and the plain wood on the others.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of each hanger and the curvature of the metal hooks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the hangers, with the patterns still visible on two and the plain finish on the others.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slimness and the way the hooks are oriented.
